---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Seocheon
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Include any technical details or design considerations.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references related to the feature request.

## Affected Modules

Which modules would this feature affect?

- [ ] `x/node`
- [ ] `x/activity`
- [ ] `app`
- [ ] CLI tools
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___
